hero.description: I design and build real-world software solutions, from backends and integrations to infrastructure, home automation, and IoT, with a product mindset and business focus.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Software Engineer with experience in designing and building real-world systems, ranging from backends and complex integrations to infrastructure, automation, and IoT solutions. My career is shaped by working in business-oriented professional environments, as well as by building my own products.
about.p2: I have worked as a developer and functional consultant on ERP projects, custom integrations, and freelance development, tackling complex technical challenges and turning them into scalable, maintainable solutions aligned with client needs.

nebstala.title: Nebstala · Smart Domotics Management for STR
nebstala.description: A smart domotics management system for short-term rental (STR) properties, centralizing access control, climate management, and smart devices to automate operations, reduce energy consumption, and enhance the guest experience.

homelab.title: Home Lab Server
homelab.description: A self-hosted infrastructure for virtualization, containers, and service deployment, used as a development, testing, automation, and DevOps experimentation environment.

unitree.title: Unitree Robotics Integration
unitree.description: A quadruped robotics integration and control project, combining software, systems, and IoT for experimentation, automation, and advanced device control.

odoo.title: Odoo Development & Integrations
odoo.description: Custom module development, tailored integrations, and functional consulting in ERP environments to optimize business processes.

meshtastic.title: Meshtastic · Mesh Networking & LoRa
meshtastic.description: Deployment and configuration of LoRa-based mesh networks with Meshtastic, focused on decentralized, resilient, and long-range communications, integrating nodes, sensors, and custom services.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Do you have a project in mind or just want to chat? I'd love to hear from you.
